content:
type: INTENT
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Will add 'domain' local var + branch in parse() while-loop (before the assign-type check, alongside trimmed handling), extend _make_node() signature with domain param to emit dgettext/dngettext calls, and add dgettext/dngettext plumbing in _install/_install_callables/_uninstall. Should compose fine with trans_metadata additions as long as we each add our own local vars/branches rather than restructuring the loop; will re-check before finalizing.

fields.summary: Will add 'domain' local var + branch in parse() while-loop (before the assign-type check, alongside trimmed handling), extend _make_node() signature with domain param to emit dgettext/dngettext calls, and add dgettext/dngettext plumbing in _install/_install_callables/_uninstall. content:
type: STATUS
files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Domain feature complete: added domain as its own if-block (checked right after the duplicate-name check, before the assign/trimmed branch), with skip_if('comma') to allow optional trailing comma; _make_node() gained domain as final keyword-defaulted param (domain: Optional[str]=None) appended after num_called_num, called via dgettext/dngettext when set. Also added dgettext/dngettext plumbing to _install/_install_callables/_uninstall/newstyle helpers. Full 830-test suite passes; patch written to patch.txt. Since our params are both appended at the end with defaults and separate if-blocks, our approaches should be independently mergeable if ever combined.
